creator: joseph@randomnetworks.com
text:
[PORT UPDATE] - graphics/gifsicle 1.20->1.23
From the changelog at http://www.lcdf.org/gifsicle/changes.html :

1.23 12.Dec.2000 
In Houston on a layover because of stupid Continental Airlines: allow GIFs 
without terminators.  Problem reported by Matt Olech <Matt.Olech@airliance.com>.

1.22 23.Nov.2000 
Handle time more carefully when displaying animations. Should result in more 
precise timings.  Problem reported by Iris Baye <ibaye@gwdg.de>. 

1.21 9.Sep.2000 
Fixed `--careful -O2', which could create bad GIFs when there were bad 
interactions with transparency. Bug reported by Manfred Schwarb 
<schwarb@geo.umnw.ethz.ch>.

Fix: This diff was generated by : diff -ruN gifsicle.orig gifsicle
From : /usr/ports/graphics
-------------------------------------------------------------------
